channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump fires Kristi Noem; replacement pick Markwayne Mullin says nomination is ‘pretty humbling’ – US politics live
item.description: President picks ‘Maga warrior’ as nominee to replace Noem as Democrats hail decision after months of controversy Trump ousts Kristi Noem and replaces ...

item.title: Trump fires homeland security secretary Kristi Noem
item.description: Markwayne Mullin, Republican senator and Maga ally, to replace Noem as Democrats cheer departure of ‘disaster’ US politics live – latest updates Donal...

item.title: Suspect apprehended after three women found dead in rural Utah
item.description: Suspect identified as Ivan Miller, 22, found after he was tracked in one of the victims’ vehicles, authorities say Sign up for the Breaking News US em...

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump demands say in choosing Iran’s next supreme leader; Israel tells hundreds of thousands to flee Beirut
item.description: Evacuation order issued for all of the southern suburbs with up to 700,000 people thought to be affected Tell us: how have you been affected by the la...

item.title: Australia news live: Labor tight-lipped on Australians on submarine that sank Iran warship; more stranded travellers return from Middle East
item.description: Tony Burke says commercial flights needed to unclog backlog of travellers stuck in Middle East. Follow the latest updates live Get our breaking news e...

item.title: 'Brave and brilliant, Russell has compelling case as Scotland's greatest'
item.description: Tom English assesses Finn Russell's credentials as one of Scotland's greatest as the fly-half approaches a century of caps.

item.title: Labour MP 'voluntarily suspends herself' after husband arrested in China spy probe
item.description: Joani Reid said she had temporarily stood down from the party after her husband was arrested on suspicion of spying for China.

item.title: No UK government ministers to attend Paralympic ceremonies
item.description: No UK government ministers or officials will attend the Winter Paralympics opening and closing ceremonies after Russian and Belarusian athletes were i...

item.title: Israeli evacuation order for Beirut's southern suburbs sparks panic
item.description: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.

item.title: First UK government flight departs Middle East after delay
item.description: The plane was due to leave Oman on Wednesday but remained grounded due to problems getting passengers on board.
